caption: The video concludes with a series of closing frames, indicating the end of an ORCA Media presentation. The first frame displays a black background with white text that reads, "This Has Been an ORCA Media Presentation," signaling the conclusion of the content. Following this, the next frame provides contact information for ORCA Media, including their website (www.orcamedia.net), phone number (802-224-9901), and hashtag (#orcamediavt). These frames serve as a professional and informative conclusion, directing viewers to additional resources and encouraging further engagement with ORCA Media. The overall tone is formal and straightforward, typical of a corporate or promotional video ending.
